goal: A signed-in owner can view/edit their profile (name, phone), perform full vehicle CRUD (add/edit/remove with confirmation), switch the active vehicle to scope the log, and reach all three from a real /settings page wired to the sidebar — bilingual, all states handled.
why: Turns the seeded-account assumption into a real self-service account surface — the last gap before M3 (Accounts & Settings) can close. Covers ACCT-04..10.
success_criteria: Clicking Settings opens a real /settings page with Profile / Vehicles / Security; signed-out shows a sign-in prompt, signed-in shows the user's data (ACCT-10).
Editing display name or phone and saving persists to profiles via profiles_update_own RLS and survives a hard refresh (ACCT-04, ACCT-05).
An owner can add, edit (model/plate/year inline), and remove (with a bilingual confirm dialog) vehicles; removed vehicles disappear (ACCT-06, ACCT-07, ACCT-08).
An owner with 2+ vehicles can switch the active vehicle; the log + history scope to it and the choice persists across a reload via ?v= (ACCT-09).
The Security section changes the password via the existing changePassword action with bilingual success/error.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0; no TODO/FIXME/placeholder in touched files; every new i18n key present in both el and en.

tasks.title: Migration 0008 + profile & vehicle data seam
acceptance_criteria: 0008 adds profiles.phone (text, nullable), vehicles.year (int, nullable), and a demo-permissive vehicles delete RLS policy matching 0005's using(true) style.
getProfile() returns the current user's {full_name, phone} or null when signed out; updateProfile Zod-validates name (1..80) + optional phone (max 20) and writes via profiles_update_own.
updateVehicle Zod-validates {id, model, plate(normalized), year? 1900..2030} and updates; removeVehicle validates {id} and deletes; both revalidate / and /settings.
getVehicles() selects and returns year on each OwnerVehicle.
tasks.action: Write 0008 migration: add column if not exists phone/year + create policy demo_vehicles_delete for delete using(true). In owner-actions.ts add year to OwnerVehicle + getVehicles select, add vehicleEditSchema + vehicleRemoveSchema, add updateVehicle and removeVehicle actions ({ok,error} shape, revalidate / and /settings). Create profile-actions.ts: getProfile() (getUser-gated maybeSingle) and updateProfile() (Zod name+phone, session-required, update by id=user.id, revalidate /settings).

verification.pattern: add column if not exists phone|add column if not exists year|demo_vehicles_delete
export async function updateVehicle|export async function removeVehicle
export async function getProfile|export async function updateProfile

tasks.title: Bilingual i18n keys for settings, profile, vehicle CRUD
acceptance_criteria: Translation type and both el + en dictionaries gain identical keys: profileSection, vehiclesSection, securitySection, settingsPageSubtitle, phoneLabel, phonePlaceholder, saveProfile, profileSaved, editVehicle, removeVehicle, confirmRemove, confirmRemoveHint, yearLabel, yearPlaceholder, changePassword, newPassword, confirmPassword, passwordChanged, settingsSignedOut, settingsSignedOutHint, saving.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0, proving both dictionaries satisfy the type.
Greek values are real translations matching the existing register; reuse existing nameLabel for display name (do NOT add nameLabel2).
tasks.action: Add each new key to the Translation type as string, then add EL + EN values to both dictionaries. Reuse existing nameLabel for the profile display-name label (no duplicate). Greek primary, real translations.

tasks.title: Real /settings route: Profile, Vehicles, Security panels + sidebar wiring
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Settings in the sidebar navigates to /settings (real route, /admin server-component pattern), not the inline language-only panel.
Signed-out renders a bilingual sign-in prompt (t.settingsSignedOut + Link to /login); signed-in renders Profile / Vehicles / Security with the user's data.
Profile save calls updateProfile, shows t.profileSaved, persists after a hard refresh.
Vehicles section: each row shows model+plate+year with Edit (inline pre-filled form -> updateVehicle) and Remove (bilingual confirm dialog -> removeVehicle, row disappears).
Security section: two-field form calls existing changePassword; ok shows t.passwordChanged; mismatch/error shows bilingual error.
Every control keyboard-accessible with labels; loading/error/empty/confirm states present.
tasks.action: Create src/app/settings/page.tsx (server: getProfile + getVehicles, /admin-style container, pass to SettingsClient). Create SettingsClient.tsx ('use client'): three sections using existing card/input/button patterns, useActionState for updateProfile/updateVehicle/removeVehicle/changePassword; remove-confirm overlay; Icon glyphs only; text via t.*; signed-out -> settingsSignedOut card linking /login. In AppShell.tsx route settings nav to /settings via useRouter; delete the dead inline panel.

tasks.title: Active-vehicle switcher scoped by ?v= searchParam
acceptance_criteria: page.tsx reads searchParams (?v={id}); when present and valid it hydrates getEntries(v) and passes activeVehicleId to ServiceLog; absent defaults to newest vehicle.
Switching the vehicle via the existing pill switcher updates the URL to ?v={id} and swaps history; the active vehicle persists across a hard reload.
The vehicle hero shows year when present (e.g. 'VW Golf · 2019'); absence renders cleanly with no 'null'.
tasks.action: In page.tsx use Next 16 async searchParams (Promise) to compute a validated activeId (fallback newest), hydrate entries, pass activeVehicleId to ServiceLog. In ServiceLog.tsx add activeVehicleId prop, init selectedId from it, push /?v={id} via useRouter on switchVehicle (keep getEntries transition), render selectedVehicle.year in the hero when truthy. Verify AppShell needs no change before editing it.
